
```{ojs}
colors = ["#be0021", "#ffa500", "#0021be", "#be9a00", "#800080", "#ffd700", "#808080"]
function makeWidth(inputWidth) {
  const outputWidth = 
    inputWidth > 2000 ? inputWidth * 0.4 :
    inputWidth > 1400 ? inputWidth * 0.55 :
    inputWidth * 0.7
  return outputWidth
}

function makeWidthSmall(inputWidth) {
  const outputWidth = 
    inputWidth > 2000 ? inputWidth * 0.08 :
    inputWidth > 1400 ? inputWidth * 0.1 :
    inputWidth * 0.18
  return outputWidth
}

logoAK = vl
  .markImage({
    x: makeWidth(width)/1.7 - 48,
    x2: makeWidth(width)/1.7,
    y: 20,
    opacity: 0.2,
    clip: true,
    smooth: true,
    height: 100,
  })
  .data([
    {x: 1, y: 2}
  ])
  .encode(
    vl.url()
      .value("https://appetizingdata.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/ak-logo.svg"),
  )

logoWIFO = vl
  .markImage({
    x: makeWidth(width)/1.7 - 48,
    x2: makeWidth(width)/1.7 - 2,
    y: 50,
    opacity: 0.2,
    clip: true,
    smooth: true,
    height: 100,
  })
  .data([
    {x: 1, y: 2}
  ])
  .encode(
    vl.url()
      .value("https://appetizingdata.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/08/WIFO_kurz_rechts.svg"),
  )

logo = vl.layer(logoAK, logoWIFO)
```
